result.summary: sigmacomputing.com exposes a Sigma REST API on `https://api.sigmacomputing.com/v2`, a public documentation MCP server on `https://help.sigmacomputing.com/mcp`, an authenticated Sigma MCP server with undocumented connection details, and a Sigma CLI.
result.description: Sigma is a cloud analytics and application platform for working with live warehouse data. It lets teams build dashboards, data apps, and AI-assisted workflows on governed data from systems like Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, and Redshift.

sigma_api_client.label: Sigma API client credentials
sigma_api_client.setup: In Sigma, generate API client credentials for a user as described in [Generate Sigma API client credentials](https://help.sigmacomputing.com/reference/generate-client-credentials). These credentials are then exchanged for a bearer token via the Sigma token endpoint `POST /v2/auth/token` as shown in [Get access token](https://help.sigmacomputing.com/reference/posttoken).
